name: paros
title: paros

commands.name: paros

arguments.description: Add seeds to the spider for crawling.
arguments.raw: -seed {URL1} {URL2} ... : Add seeds to the spider for crawling.

arguments.description: Run vulnerability scan depending on previously saved policy.
arguments.raw: -scan : Run vulnerability scan depending on previously saved policy.

arguments.description: Generate 'Last Scan Report' into the file_path provided.
arguments.raw: -last_scan_report [file_path]: Generate 'Last Scan Report' into the file_path provided.

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# paros -h
 file:/usr/share/paros/paros.jar
 file:/usr/share/paros/paros.jar
 GUI usage:
 	javaw paros.jar
 	java -jar paros.jar
 see java -jar paros.jar {-h|-help} for detail.
 
 Command line usage:
 java -jar paros.jar {-h|-help} {-newsession session_file_path} {options}
 options:
 
 -spider : run spider.  See other parameters
 -seed {URL1} {URL2} ... : Add seeds to the spider for crawling.
 -scan : Run vulnerability scan depending on previously saved policy.
 -last_scan_report [file_path]: Generate 'Last Scan Report' into the file_path provided.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
